peak_stamina.title: Maximize Peak Stamina output — reach the highest stamina tier through consistent activity

puffish_skills.title: Invest in Puffish Skills skill tree — allocate points in at least 3 categories

subtitle.text: Every chapter was also physical training. You are better at existing than you were at Ch01.

description: Peak Stamina tracks physical output — running, sprinting, climbing.
Higher stamina tiers increase the duration and recovery rate.
By Ch15, you should be at or near maximum.
If not, spend time sprinting and climbing to push the meter.
Puffish Skills adds a skill tree using experience points.
- Magic: spell-related bonuses if using Iron's Spellbooks
These skills are permanent — they survive death.
Unlike Diet (which resets on death), skills compound.
Invest points in what you will use in Ch16-17.
→ Invest in at least 3 Puffish Skills categories [check]
